title: NIO Q3 2024 Earnings: The Paradox Of Record Deliveries And Lagging Growth
text: NIO delivered record 61,855 vehicles in Q3 2024 showing delivery growth of 11.6% year-over-year despite revenue challenges. Management guided 72,000-75,000 deliveries for Q4, representing substantial sequential acceleration and 43.9%-49.9% year-over-year growth. Q4 2024 expected revenue growth approximately 17% to $2.9 billion, below Wall Street estimate nearly $3.2 billion. Analysis shows paradox of record deliveries amid lagging revenue growth reflecting pricing pressures in competitive Chinese EV market. Margin improvement to 10.7% gross margin and 13.1% vehicle margin shows management making progress on profitability metrics despite near-term revenue headwinds from competitive environment.
